description: Default capability set for KRIA desktop
_removed_permissions_notes: shell:default — removed: grants unrestricted shell:execute and shell:spawn.
shell:allow-execute — removed: would allow arbitrary command execution from the frontend.
shell:allow-spawn — removed: same risk as allow-execute.
shell:allow-open — removed: replaced by the Rust-side IntentDispatcher which enforces
the scheme allow-list (https/http/mailto/tel and registered deep-links only).
The `open` crate call happens inside kria-core, never driven by untrusted JS.
